description_long: This is a medium-sized paperback book with a vibrant, illustrated cover featuring a young child holding a notebook, surrounded by swirling pink and red patterns and a depiction of the Taj Mahal in the background. The front cover is predominantly pink and red with artistic, whimsical elements and a blue lower section. The back cover is mostly red with a white curved section containing a short synopsis and a small illustration of fruit. The spine is vertically split into blue and red, with no visible text or decorative elements. The book appears to be made of standard paper with a glossy or semi-glossy printed cover. The overall form is rectangular with slightly rounded edges, typical of a children's or educational book.
description: A colorful paperback book with a whimsical illustrated cover, blue and red spine, and a synopsis with fruit illustration on the back. The book is medium-sized and visually engaging.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a vivid illustration of a child with swirling pink and red patterns and a blue lower section.
description_view_1: The spine is visible, showing a vertical split of blue and red colors with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover is mostly red with a white curved section, a synopsis, and a small fruit illustration.
description_view_3: The spine is again visible from above, emphasizing the blue and red color split and the book's thickness.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration features a young child with short dark hair holding a notebook, set against a swirling, dreamlike background of pink and red hues. The scene includes a stylized depiction of the Taj Mahal and floating, whimsical patterns, giving the cover a magical and imaginative feel.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is vertically divided into blue and red halves with no visible text or decorative elements. The design is simple and color-blocked.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, round logo is visible on the lower left of the front cover, featuring a blue and white motif, likely representing the publisher.
